overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a player exploring a deserted roadside commercial building and adjacent gas station during a foggy night. The scene features heavy neon lighting, industrial architecture, and transitions between outdoor haze and dimly lit interior spaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: deserted roadside approach to neon-lit commercial building

events.description: approaching and entering the commercial building entrance

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward a run-down commercial building with glowing neon signage through foggy conditions

entered.detail: multiple utility wires crisscrossing the dark sky
tall pole with warm orange sodium vapor light
single-story concrete building with corrugated metal accents
striped plastic barrier blocking part of the entrance
glowing purple rectangular sign on building facade

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a deserted commercial building on a foggy night, walking along a dirt path beneath overhead power lines. A red and white construction barrier sits near the entrance as warm streetlights cut through the haze.

events.description: crossing threshold from foggy exterior into dimly lit interior space
beginning ascent up metal staircase to upper floor

agents.ego_description: moving through the ground floor past arcade machines and ascending a stairwell with exposed ceiling pipes

entered.detail: open doorway leading into the building's interior
vintage standing arcade cabinet with blue housing
industrial metal staircase with railings leading upward
network of exposed ventilation and electrical conduits

segments.scene_description: The player enters the building, transitioning from the foggy exterior to a dimly lit interior illuminated by pink neon lights. The ground floor features arcade machines and scattered debris before the player ascends a metal stairwell with exposed piping overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper floor lounge with bar and gaming machines

events.description: arriving on upper floor revealing lounge area with pool table and bar
moving through areas with shifting neon colors from pink to red lighting

agents.ego_description: exploring the upper floor lounge, examining the bar area, pool table, and vending machines while moving through beaded curtains

entered.detail: green felt pool table with balls and cues in the lounge area
long counter with neon lighting and stools
tall purple vending machine with illuminated product display
black beaded curtain separating room sections
television screen displaying a news broadcast

segments.scene_description: The player explores the upper floor lounge, a dimly lit space with vibrant pink and purple neon lighting. The area features a pool table, bar counter with stools, vending machines, and beaded curtains dividing the space, with a television displaying news in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned gas station with workshop and fuel pumps

events.description: exiting the building into the gas station area with green fluorescent lighting
turning right to explore the gas station canopy and workshop area

agents.ego_description: exiting the building through double doors and exploring the deserted gas station, examining the workshop and fuel pumps

notable_agents.action: abandoned red car with open doors sitting near the gas station

entered.detail: large metal canopy with green fluorescent lighting covering the pumps
old-fashioned fuel dispenser with digital price display
open garage bay with tools and equipment visible inside
derelict red sedan with damaged body panels
tall illuminated sign displaying fuel prices in green neon

segments.scene_description: The player exits the building into a deserted gas station bathed in green fluorescent light. An abandoned red car sits near vintage fuel pumps under a large canopy, while an open workshop bay reveals tools and equipment inside. The area shows signs of neglect with overgrown weeds.

scene_state.functional_zone: deserted dirt road with industrial structures

events.description: leaving the gas station and entering the open dirt road

agents.ego_description: walking away from the gas station down a deserted dirt road lined with power poles and industrial scaffolding

entered.detail: unpaved road surface with tire tracks and scattered debris
striped concrete barriers blocking part of the roadway
tall metal framework structure with platforms

segments.scene_description: The player leaves the gas station behind and walks down a deserted dirt road. The foggy night reveals industrial scaffolding and power lines stretching into the distance, with red and white road barriers lining the path ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a foggy roadside approach into a neon-lit interior and back out into a desolate industrial landscape. It begins on a dirt path beneath overhead power lines, moving past a red and white construction barrier as warm streetlights pierce through the heavy night haze. As the camera enters the building, the atmosphere shifts from the foggy exterior to a dimly lit interior bathed in pink neon, passing arcade machines and debris before ascending a metal stairwell with exposed piping. The scene then expands into an upper-floor lounge filled with purple lighting, pool tables, and beaded curtains, before transitioning back outside into a gas station illuminated by green fluorescent light and featuring an abandoned red car. Finally, the camera leaves the station behind to walk down a deserted dirt road, where industrial scaffolding and road barriers fade into the distant fog.
